mapper.sql: t.id, t.engineer_id, t.project_id, t.task_id, t.work_date, t.hours, t.overtime_hours, t.travel_days, t.description, t.status, t.approver_id, t.approve_time, t.create_time, e.name AS engineer_name, p.project_name AS project_name, pt.task_name AS task_name, approver.real_name AS approver_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM timesheet t LEFT JOIN engineer e ON e.id = t.engineer_id AND e.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_task pt ON pt.id = t.task_id AND pt.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user approver ON approver.id = t.approver_id AND approver.deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0

SELECT
t.engineer_id AS engineerId, e.name AS engineerName, NULL AS projectId, NULL AS projectName, NULL AS statKey
NULL AS engineerId, NULL AS engineerName, t.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, NULL AS statKey
t.engineer_id AS engineerId, e.name AS engineerName, t.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, DATE_FORMAT(t.work_date, '%Y-%m') AS statKey
t.engineer_id AS engineerId, e.name AS engineerName, t.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName, NULL AS statKey
, COALESCE(SUM(t.hours), 0) AS totalHours, COALESCE(SUM(t.overtime_hours), 0) AS totalOvertimeHours, COALESCE(SUM(t.travel_days), 0) AS totalTravelDays, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(t.hours), 0) / 8, 2) AS totalManDays, COUNT(t.id) AS recordCount FROM timesheet t LEFT JOIN engineer e ON e.id = t.engineer_id AND e.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0
t.deleted = 0 AND t.status = 'APPROVED'
AND t.engineer_id = #{query.engineerId}
AND t.project_id = #{query.projectId}
AND t.work_date >= #{query.startDate}
AND t.work_date <= #{query.endDate}
GROUP BY t.engineer_id, e.name ORDER BY t.engineer_id
GROUP BY t.project_id, p.project_name ORDER BY t.project_id
GROUP BY t.engineer_id, e.name, t.project_id, p.project_name, DATE_FORMAT(t.work_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY statKey, t.engineer_id
GROUP BY t.engineer_id, e.name, t.project_id, p.project_name ORDER BY t.engineer_id, t.project_id
